creator: W.J.Zwart@NescioLudens.nl
text:
Hello Marcelo

Thanks; fine with me; I will dive into that, but please note: the rc
script is not changed in this update. Although I agree to the fact
that we should for improvements constantly, I can imagine that for the
overall update speed of ports it's better to just look at the changes.

thanks

Willem Jaap

Marcelo Araujo wrote:
> Hey Maintainership!
>
>
> The rc file is incorrect! You need to do how the HandBook explain.
> See in:
> http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/rc-s
> cripts.html Check the rc script in files/, and build with the correct
> form!
>
>
> Best Regards.
>
>
> --
> Marcelo Araujo
> araujo@FreeBSD.org http://www.FreeBSD.org
>
>
>
>
